# Performance Optimization Template

## Purpose

Guide measured performance work.

## Reference When

Use when optimizing runner, parser, metrics, report generation, or CLI startup.

## AI Agents Must Obey

Measure before and after.

## Template

```md
# Performance Optimization: <name>

## Bottleneck

Evidence:

## Target

## Constraints

Benchmark validity:
Compatibility:

## Change

## Before/After Measurements

## Risks

## Tests

## Rollback
```
